statement: In every magma, Equation 763 (`x = y * (z * ((y * y) * z))`) implies Equation 3389 (`x * y = z * (x * (z * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0252
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op y y) z)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op z (op x (op z z)))
